retry_reason: If refcount was zero, the system BUGs; if refcount was >0, kref_put always succeeds; no failure to retry.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases one reference on a dlm_master_list_entry via kref_put. Must be called with both dlm->spinlock and dlm->master_lock held. If the refcount is already zero (double-put or use-after-free), the function logs an error and triggers a BUG. After this function returns, the caller must not use the mle object as it may have been freed. This is a release operation; the caller transfers ownership of its reference.
